overall.description: Gameplay footage from a high-fidelity action RPG (Monster Hunter Wilds) showing a hunter character exploring a rocky, crystalline cave environment at night. The character traverses the terrain on foot and briefly on a mount, encounters an NPC, and approaches a mining resource node.

events.description: character mounts the Seikret creature briefly before dismounting
character dismounts and continues on foot

agents.ego_description: walking through rocky terrain and briefly mounting a creature to traverse the crystalline landscape

notable_agents.action: Palico companion following closely behind the player character

blue glowing crystalline rock surface covering the ground
steep rock wall with layered sedimentary texture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rocky canyon at night, dominated by a tall rock spire. The hunter character walks across glowing blue crystalline ground, briefly mounts a Seikret creature, then continues on foot while their Palico companion follows.

events.description: another hunter character on a mount comes into view ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: traversing the crystalline terrain toward another hunter standing near the cave entrance

Palico companion continuing to follow the player

entered.detail: dark opening leading into a cave system visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The hunter continues across the crystalline basin as the tall rock spire recedes behind. A dark cave entrance becomes visible ahead, and another hunter named Alba is seen waiting on their mount near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to dark cave with crystalline ground

large flying creature soars overhead from left to right

segments.scene_description: As the hunter approaches the cave, dialogue appears suggesting a mining opportunity. A large flying creature soars overhead, casting a shadow. The cave entrance grows larger in the frame while Alba waits nearby on their mount.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark cave interior with bioluminescent mining node

events.description: character enters the dark cave from the open crystalline area
character approaches and prepares to interact with the glowing mining outcrop

agents.ego_description: entering the dark cave and approaching a glowing mining resource node

notable_agents.action: Palico following into the cave and stopping near the mining node

entered.detail: shadowy rock walls of the cave interior
shadowy rock walls of the cave interior
glowing blue and yellow crystalline rock formation embedded in the cave wall
rocky ceiling of the cave with stalactites

segments.scene_description: The hunter enters the dark cave, leaving the open sky behind. The environment becomes enclosed by dark rock walls. Ahead, a glowing mining outcrop emits blue and yellow light. The hunter approaches the node while their Palico follows into the cave.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, crystalline canyon at night into the depths of a dark, enclosed cavern. It begins with the hunter traversing glowing blue crystalline ground beneath a towering rock spire, briefly mounting a Seikret before continuing on foot with a Palico companion. As the spire recedes, the camera moves across the basin toward a dark cave entrance where another hunter, Alba, waits on a mount. The scene then shifts as a large flying creature soars overhead, casting a shadow across the terrain just as the hunter approaches the mouth of the cave. Finally, the camera follows the hunter and Palico as they leave the open sky behind to enter the dark rocky interior, moving toward a glowing mining outcrop that emits blue and yellow light.
